data.title: KIMPTON ASHBEL NEW YORK - PARK AVENUE OPENS IN HISTORIC MIDTOWN MANHATTAN LANDMARK
data.description: In Midtown Manhattan, a unique residential-style hotel called Kimpton Ashbel New York-Park Avenue has recently opened. This boutique luxury hotel is part of the IHG luxury line and strives to create a neighborhood feel with gathering spaces and a new café. The hotel offers a new take on traditional design and aims to provide guests with a comfortable and cozy atmosphere in the bustling city. Located in a prime location, the Kimpton Ashbel New York-Park Avenue is set to become a popular spot in the area.
Brent Crude futures settle at $101.91/bbl, up $3.43, 3.48%.

data.title: xTool Launches WonderPress: The World's First 5-in-1 Heat Creative Hub for Makers and Small Businesses
data.description: A new versatile creative device, offering Auto Heat Press, 3D Sublimation, Vacuum Forming, DTF Curing, and Craft Baking functions, will debut on Kickstarter on April 28, 2026. Developed by xTool, a leading desktop creative tools brand based in Neuss, Germany, this all-in-one machine caters to a wide range of creative needs. Boasting a user base of more than 500,000 worldwide, xTool is set to introduce this innovative product that promises to revolutionize the artistic and DIY industry.

data.title: Auburn's College of Education embraces an AI-powered future to advance its mission
data.description: In Auburn, Alabama on April 22, 2026, Auburn University's College of Education is increasing its emphasis on Artificial Intelligence (AI) to enhance the training of future educators as AI becomes more prevalent in society. This move aims to equip educators with the necessary skills to effectively utilize this technology in their roles. This effort is a response to the growing integration of AI into various aspects of daily life, emphasizing the importance of preparing educators to adapt to these advancements.

data.title: SportsMed Physical Therapy CEO Dr. Ponzini Recognized on NJBIZ Health Care Power List 2026
data.description: In Ridgewood, New Jersey, on April 22, 2026, SportsMed Physical Therapy revealed that Dr. Peter Ponzini, the CEO, has been selected as an honoree on the NJBIZ Health Care Power List 2026. This distinguished acknowledgment celebrates influential figures in the health care sector across New Jersey.

data.title: Playboy Launches Global Model Search, Turns Talent Discovery into a Fan-Driven Revenue Engine
data.description: In Los Angeles, Playboy has introduced a new global model search to find the face of their exclusive partnership with Honey Birdette, a top intimates brand. The casting competition aims to transform talent discovery and enhance audience engagement. Aspiring models and creators globally can participate to have a chance to star in a worldwide advertising campaign and feature in.

data.title: True Sea Moss Expands Retail Presence with Launch at Whole Foods Market Stores
data.description: A rapidly expanding functional food company, True Sea Moss, has introduced its wild-harvested Sea Moss Gels to prominent natural grocer Whole Foods Market. As of April 22, 2026, customers can find these products at select stores, marking a significant milestone for the brand.

data.title: Guy Harvey Launches New, Premium Marlin Air Sun Protection Collection That’s Engineered for the Heat, Cool by Design, Soft to Wear and Made to Fish
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Guy Harvey, Inc. has unveiled its latest innovation, the premium Marlin Air Collection, designed for optimal sun protection during extended periods on the water. This new line marks the company's most advanced offering to date in this category. The collection is tailored for individuals seeking protection from harmful UV rays, delivering both functionality and style. With the Marlin Air Collection, Guy Harvey, Inc. continues to cater to outdoor enthusiasts and adventurers.

data.title: Leading with Care: Virbac Becomes a Human-Animal Bond Certified Company
data.description: In Westlake, Texas, on April 22, 2026, the North American Veterinary Community (NAVC) and the Human Animal Bond Research Institute (HABRI) revealed that Virbac Corporation (Virbac) has achieved Human-Animal Bond Certification. This signifies Virbac's significant dedication to training and education in this field.

data.title: Blue Moon Announces Follow on Investment of C$4.8M from Hartree
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. (TSXV: MOON) (NASDAQ: BMM) based in Toronto made an announcement on April 22, 2026, regarding their partnership with Hartree Partners LP. The partnership was established through an investor rights agreement signed on March 7, 2025, known as the Hartree IRA. This agreement signifies a strategic alliance for the company, highlighting the importance of the collaboration.

data.title: Poetry Inn Begins a New Chapter as Sttupa Estate Napa Valley
data.description: Located in Yountville, California, the Poetry Inn has been rebranded as Sttupa Estate Napa Valley. The luxury boutique hotel is embracing this new name to reflect its dedication to providing a bespoke experience for guests, as it has done for over 20 years. The concept of a stupa, symbolizing a space that enhances the connection between humans and nature, is at the core of Sttupa Estate's values of exclusivity, tranquility, and genuineness. The transformation represents a continuation of the property's commitment to offering a unique and meaningful stay for visitors.

data.title: NY Attorney General accuses Coinbase & Gemini of illegal gambling for launching prediction markets.
data.description: The Attorney General identified that cryptocurrency industry leaders were unlawfully operating betting platforms within the state, following their venture into prediction markets, which currently have minimal regulations in place.

data.title: Four IEQ Capital Founders Recognized by Forbes as Top Ten Wealth Advisors in Northern California
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Francisco, IEQ Capital, a reputable wealth management firm and multi-family office, revealed that its founders and advisors, Robert Skinner, Alan Zafran, Eric Harrison, and Jeff Westsmith, were recognized by Forbes as part of the Best-in-State Wealth list. Forbes showcases the top professionals in the industry, highlighting their expertise and excellence in managing wealth. This recognition further solidifies the standing of IEQ Capital in the industry.

data.title: Ellucian Announces 2026 Impact Award Winners, Honoring Institutions Leading with Data, SaaS, and Student-First Innovation
data.description: Ellucian honored four institutions for their creative utilization of the company's technology solutions to enhance student outcomes and operational efficiency. The recipients showcased tangible results by embracing SaaS transformation, utilizing data-driven strategies, and prioritizing student-centric approaches.
